text.title: project-integration Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for project-integration as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Status colour declared GREEN/YELLOW/RED based on PM narrative rather than numeric threshold comparison.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents over-summarize: declaring "GREEN — on track" without numeric backing is the dominant integration failure. Colour must follow threshold arithmetic.

failure-mode.description: Agent produces cross-area impact analysis that only covers the areas it has API access to.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: An agent with only Jira access produces schedule-blind reports. Force an input audit: every knowledge area must appear in the impact memo or be explicitly marked "data unavailable".

failure-mode.description: Closure declared complete with an empty lessons-learned file.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents skip lessons learned because there is no code change. Force the closure checklist to fail-close if the lessons file is empty.

failure-mode.description: Charter sign-off automated by the agent merging its own PR.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Charter sign-off is a governance decision requiring sponsor authority; the agent prepares the PR and the sponsor approves the merge.
